title: Global Markets Brief — 18 Jun 2026
intro: Risk-off sentiment dominates as US equities sell off sharply while haven flows boost JPY and gold remains elevated, suggesting growth concerns outweigh inflation narratives.

sections.heading: 🌍 MACRO TONE
sections.content: Risk-off sentiment dominates as US equities sell off sharply while haven flows boost JPY and gold remains elevated, suggesting growth concerns outweigh inflation narratives.

sections.heading: 📊 FX RANKING
sections.content:
NZD +0.24% — Commodity currency strength on resilient China data expectations
AUD +0.24% — Tracking NZD higher with resource sector optimism
EUR +0.07% — Modest gains as ECB policy path remains data-dependent
GBP +0.05% — Holding steady amid BoE rate speculation
JPY -0.04% — Slightly weaker despite risk-off tone; intervention concerns persist at 160.60
CHF 0.00% — Neutral safe-haven positioning
CAD -0.08% — Pressured by crude oil weakness and softer energy revenues
USD — Mid-pack, mixed performance across majors

sections.heading: 💱 KEY PAIRS
sections.content:
EURUSD 1.1515 | Bias: NEUTRAL | Watch: 1.1480 support, 1.1550 resistance for directional break
USDJPY 160.6030 | Bias: SHORT | Watch: 161.00 for MOF intervention risk, topside exhaustion evident
AUDUSD 0.7035 | Bias: LONG | Watch: 0.7000 support holds, targeting 0.7080 on commodity resilience

sections.heading: 📈 INDICES
sections.content:
Nikkei 225: 71053 +1.65% — Japanese exporters benefit from weaker yen offsetting global risk-off
S&P 500: 5740.96 -1.25% — Tech-led selloff extends on valuation concerns and rate uncertainty
Nasdaq: 26022 -1.34% — Growth stocks under pressure as bond yields remain elevated
Dow Jones: 51493 -0.98% — Defensive rotation fails to stabilize broader market weakness

sections.heading: 🛢️ COMMODITIES
sections.content:
Gold $4322.80 -1.34% — Profit-taking after extended rally, but underlying bid remains on geopolitical hedging
WTI Crude $74.10 -2.51% — Demand concerns resurface as US equity weakness signals growth slowdown fears
Silver $68.84 -2.72% — Industrial demand worries amplify sell-off beyond gold's retreat

sections.heading: ₿ CRYPTO
sections.content:
Bitcoin $64116 -0.52% — Consolidating near key support; institutional flows remain cautious amid equity volatility
Ethereum $1736.48 -0.71% — Underperforming BTC as DeFi activity slows; watching $1700 support level closely

sections.heading: 🎯 TRADE IDEAS
sections.content:
LONG: AUDUSD 0.7000-0.7020 | China stimulus speculation supports Aussie against USD weakness
LONG: Gold 4280-4300 | Dip-buying opportunity as geopolitical premium and haven demand persist
SHORT: USDJPY 160.80-161.20 |
